title: fix: app-update-metrics uses PR instead of direct push
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Metrics flowing again
gist.blurb: Fixed a branch protection issue that was blocking our app metrics updates. The automated greenhouse bot now politely submits a PR instead of trying to push directly to main.
gist.summary: Updated the app metrics GitHub workflow to create an auto-merging PR instead of pushing directly to main, resolving branch protection blocks.
gist.impact: Internal app metrics and README updates will now successfully run and merge automatically.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking happily at a glowing chart/metrics board, representing the restored flow of data.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot looking happily at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) chart on a retro terminal screen. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot looking happily at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) chart on a retro terminal screen. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful.
